prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: near-foreground reed-and-grass cutout reused in scenes 3 and 5 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample; match its bottom foreground grass band but isolate it cleanly
Primary request: a sparse reed-and-grass band across the bottom 16 percent with two taller reed clusters near the far corners, leaving both character zones and center open
Style/medium: handcrafted torn-paper foliage with fibers, restrained ink, muted deep teal and tea-brown
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background, no shadow or gradient; no #ff00ff in plants; no people, text, watermark or logo; complete silhouette
Avoid: dense wall of grass, photorealism, glossy 3D
